composite_rejection_and_delegation.description: Agent handles composite query requiring both rejection decision AND delegation decision — out-of-role + worker dispatch
composite_rejection_and_delegation.observable_check: execution_log contains rejection_analysis AND delegation_dispatch AND query contains both out-of-role element AND investigation need

composite_rejection_and_compliance.description: Agent handles composite query requiring both rejection decision AND compliance verification — boundary check
composite_rejection_and_compliance.observable_check: execution_log contains rejection_decision AND compliance_verification AND query requires checking both role fit AND write boundary

composite_delegation_and_synthesis.description: Agent handles composite query requiring both worker dispatch AND synthesis of multiple worker outputs
composite_delegation_and_synthesis.observable_check: execution_log contains multiple_dispatches AND synthesis_output AND query requires both parallel dispatch and combination

handles_rejection_plus_delegation_compos.description: Agent MUST correctly handle composite queries requiring both rejection and delegation — reject out-of-role, dispatch correct archetype for in-scope investigation
handles_rejection_plus_delegation_compos.observable_check: execution_log contains explicit rejection AND correct archetype dispatch AND boundary between them is clear

handles_delegation_plus_synthesis_compos.description: Agent MUST correctly handle composite queries requiring both parallel dispatch and synthesis — dispatch workers, combine outputs correctly
handles_delegation_plus_synthesis_compos.observable_check: execution_log contains parallel_dispatch AND synthesis_correct AND worker outputs are correctly combined

handles_slicing_and_archetype_composite.description: Agent MUST handle composite queries requiring both horizontal slicing and archetype selection per slice
handles_slicing_and_archetype_composite.observable_check: execution_log contains slice_boundaries AND archetype_selection AND each slice has correct archetype

does_not_partial_composite_rejection.description: Agent MUST NOT reject without also correctly dispatching in-scope investigation elements
does_not_partial_composite_rejection.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains rejection AND in-scope elements AND no dispatch for in-scope elements)

does_not_skip_synthesis_for_partial.description: Agent MUST NOT produce partial brief by skipping synthesis step — all worker outputs must be combined
does_not_skip_synthesis_for_partial.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains brief AND worker_outputs_exist AND synthesis_step_missing)

does_not_extract_principles_without_synt.description: Agent MUST NOT extract principles before synthesizing worker outputs — synthesis precedes principle extraction
does_not_extract_principles_without_synt.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains principle_extraction AND synthesis_missing AND worker_outputs_exist)
